description_long: This is a large, industrial-style dumpster with a trapezoidal blue metal body that is heavily weathered and rusted, giving it a gritty, urban appearance. The front face features the text 'Stinky Pete Waste Container' in bold white letters, adding a touch of character and humor. The top is covered by a segmented, flat black lid made of what appears to be heavy-duty plastic or metal, designed to be lifted for waste disposal. The sides and back are plain, with visible rust patches and paint chipping, indicating prolonged outdoor exposure. There are no visible handles, wheels, or warning labels, and the structure appears robust and utilitarian. This dumpster is typical of those found in alleys, behind commercial buildings, or in public parks for large-scale waste collection.
description: A large, weathered blue metal dumpster with a segmented black lid and bold white lettering on the front. Its rusted, urban look suggests heavy outdoor use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'Stinky Pete Waste Container' text and the segmented black lid.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the sloped, rusted blue metal surface and the overhanging black lid.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain, rusted blue metal surface and no visible text or features.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the angled lid and weathered blue metal body.
attribute_lid_type: flat, segmented lid with four sections, likely made of plastic or metal, no visible locking or opening mechanisms
